content.query:
USE gold_db
GO

CREATE OR ALTER PROC CreateSQLServerlessView_gold 
    @ViewName NVARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @sql NVARCHAR(MAX)

    SET @ViewName = LTRIM(RTRIM(@ViewName))

    SET @sql = N'
    CREATE OR ALTER VIEW [' + @ViewName + '] AS
    SELECT *
    FROM OPENROWSET(
        BULK ''https://intechsacc.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/SalesLT/' + @ViewName + '/'',
        FORMAT = ''DELTA''
    ) AS result'

    EXEC (@sql)
END
GO
